name: Rhubarb Radio Pudding
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Pudding: In a bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Stir in rhubarb and raisins. In a separate bowl, beat together milk, egg, and vanilla just enough to combine; stir into flour mixture. Pour batter into greased 8-inch square baking dish.
Sauce: In boiling water, stir sugar and butter until sugar dissolves and butter melts. Add lemon juice, rind, and nutmeg. Pour gently over batter. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes until pudding is golden brown on top and center is firm to touch.
SERVES: 6
